title: Totems of the lololoshka seasons
body:
# Totems of the lololoshka seasons

_Totems of the Lololoshka seasons_ - is a  that replaces the standard totems of immortality with characters of the Lololoshka seasons. Example
- Totem of immortality in the form of Dylan, Oketra,
- Raya Prime, Raya Aber and The Observer  


## How to install
- Download **Totems of the lololoshka seasons.zip**
- Go to %appdata%
- Copy .zip в / Roaming /.minecraft/resourcepacks.
- Load Minecraft and select the _Totems of the lololoshka seasons_ Resource Pack.


<details>
<summary>Terms of use</summary>



</details>

You are allowed to alter Totems of the Lololoshka seasons as long as it's not distributed, please keep these to yourself. Do not reupload any instance of the Totems of the Lololoshka seasons texture pack. If you want to create addons for Totems of the Lololoshka seasons, make sure that no unnecessary textures exist in the addon texture pack, only then are you allowed to upload it.
